body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: UU_ROOT portability across machines
body.intention: I intend to verify that UU_ROOT auto-detection works correctly and no hardcoded paths regressed.
body.description:
**What changed:** UU_ROOT env var introduced; skill run scripts migrated away from CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS.
**Predicted unintended effects:** Auto-detection may return wrong path if package installed in editable mode in unexpected location; CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS alias may break scripts that set it explicitly to a different path; skill run scripts may have missed CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS references in edge cases.
**Signals to watch:** Run grep -r CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS skills/*/run after ship; run python3 skills/savestate/run midstream test without UU_ROOT set; verify on a second machine or fresh shell.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-23.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate and close
**Completion criteria:** Verify grep clean + savestate runs without env var; annotate outcome.
